  • Package com.genologics.ri.artifact

    • Class com.genologics.ri.artifact.Artifact

      class Artifact extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      4667019853212119178L

      • Serialized Fields

        • artifactGroups
          List<ArtifactGroupLink> artifactGroups
          The list of artifact groups this artifact belongs to.
        • controlType
          ControlTypeLink controlType
          The control type if this artifact is a control sample.
        • demux
          DemuxLink demux
          The demultiplexing information for this artifact if it is a pool.
          Since:
          2.26
        • fields
          List<UDF> fields
          The list of user-defined fields for this artifact.
        • file
          ClarityFile file
          The file associated with this artifact, if any.
        • limsid
          String limsid
          The LIMS id of the artifact.
        • location
          Location location
          The location of the artifact.
        • name
          String name
          The name of the artifact.
        • outputType
          OutputType outputType
          The output type of the artifact.
        • parentProcess
          ParentProcessLink parentProcess
          The parent process that produced this artifact.
        • qcFlag
          QCFlag qcFlag
          The quality control flag for this artifact.
        • reagentLabels
          List<ReagentLabel> reagentLabels
          The list of reagent labels applied to this artifact.
        • samples
          List<SampleLink> samples
          The list of samples associated with this artifact.
        • type
          String type
          The type of the artifact.
        • uri
          URI uri
          The URI of the artifact.
        • workflowStages
          List<WorkflowStage> workflowStages
          The workflow stages this artifact is associated with.
          Since:
          2.20
        • workingFlag
          Boolean workingFlag
          Flag indicating if this artifact is in a working state.

  • Package com.genologics.ri.configuration

    • Class com.genologics.ri.configuration.Field

      class Field extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      -1997333408044717019L

      • Serialized Fields

        • allowNonPresetValues
          Boolean allowNonPresetValues
          Whether values other than preset values are allowed.
        • attachToCategory
          String attachToCategory
          The category this field is attached to.
        • attachToName
          String attachToName
          The name of the entity type this field is attached to.
        • childUris
          List<String> childUris
          The URIs of child fields for hierarchical fields.
        • controlledVocabulary
          Boolean controlledVocabulary
          Whether this field uses a controlled vocabulary.
        • deviation
          Boolean deviation
          Whether this field represents a deviation.
        • dynamicPresets
          Boolean dynamicPresets
          Whether this field uses dynamic presets.
          Since:
          2.34
        • editable
          Boolean editable
          Whether this field is editable.
        • firstPresetIsDefaultValue
          Boolean firstPresetIsDefaultValue
          Whether the first preset value is the default.
        • maxValue
          Double maxValue
          The maximum value for numeric fields.
        • minValue
          Double minValue
          The minimum value for numeric fields.
        • name
          String name
          The name of the field.
        • parentUri
          URI parentUri
          The URI of the parent field for hierarchical fields.
        • precision
          Integer precision
          The display precision for numeric fields.
        • presets
          List<String> presets
          The list of preset values for this field.
        • required
          Boolean required
          Whether this field is required.
        • showInLablink
          Boolean showInLablink
          Whether this field should be shown in Lablink.
        • showInTables
          Boolean showInTables
          Whether this field should be shown in tables.
        • type
          FieldType type
          The type of this field.
        • typeDefinition
          TypeDefinition typeDefinition
          The type definition for complex types.
        • unitLabel
          String unitLabel
          The unit label for numeric fields.
        • uri
          URI uri
          The URI of this field configuration.

          UDT type
          The user-defined type for the container.
        • uri
          URI uri
          The URI of the container.

      class CalibrantWell extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      218110772739169852L

          String name
          Deprecated.
          The name of the calibrant well.
        • value

          Deprecated.

    • Class com.genologics.ri.containertype.ContainerType

      class ContainerType extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      -3778472967085446652L

      • Serialized Fields

        • calibrantWells
          List<CalibrantWell> calibrantWells
          Deprecated.
          This property is no longer supported and will be ignored if provided.
          List of calibrant wells that are reserved for calibrants in containers of this type.
        • columns
          Dimension columns
          The x-dimension (horizontal/columns) of the container's coordinate system.
        • name
          String name
          The name of the container type.
        • rows
          Dimension rows
          The y-dimension (vertical/rows) of the container's coordinate system.
        • tube
          Boolean tube
          Indicates whether this container type represents a tube (single well) or a multi-well container.
        • unavailableWells
          List<String> unavailableWells
          List of well locations that are not available for storing samples or reagents. Well locations are specified using the coordinate system defined by the x-dimension and y-dimension.
        • uri
          URI uri
          The URI for accessing this container type resource.

    • Class com.genologics.ri.containertype.Dimension

      class Dimension extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      -1931190014491768673L

      • Serialized Fields

        • alpha
          Boolean alpha
          Whether numbering in this dimension is using letters (true) or numbers (false).
        • offset
          Integer offset
          The offset applied to the first element in this dimension. For example, an offset of 1 means the first element is numbered/lettered as 1 or B instead of 0 or A.
        • size
          Integer size
          The size (number of elements) in this dimension.

    • Class com.genologics.ri.processtype.ProcessOutput

      class ProcessOutput extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      3584171153300804850L

      • Serialized Fields

        • artifactType
          String artifactType
          The artifact type for the output.
        • assignWorkingFlag
          Boolean assignWorkingFlag
          Deprecated.
          This property is no longer supported.
          Whether the working flag should be assigned to the output when the process runs.
        • displayName
          String displayName
          The display name for the output.
        • fieldDefinitions
          List<FieldLink> fieldDefinitions
          Deprecated.
          These field definitions are ignored as of Clarity LIMS 5.0.
          Field definitions for the output.
        • numberOfOutputs
          Integer numberOfOutputs
          The number of outputs to generate (only applies if variabilityType is FIXED).
        • outputGenerationType
          OutputGenerationType outputGenerationType
          Specifies how the outputs are generated in relation to the inputs.
        • outputName
          String outputName
          Pattern for specifying how the output name is generated.
        • variabilityType
          VariabilityType variabilityType
          Specifies how the process determines the number of outputs to generate.

    • Class com.genologics.ri.processtype.ProcessType

      class ProcessType extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      3103866326222677563L

          The name of the process type.

          2.25

          Process output configurations.

          The physical storage location of this reagent lot.

      class ProcessStep extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      8157777981636538216L

      • Serialized Fields

        • actions
          ActionsLink actions
          Link to the actions associated with this step.
        • arrangements
          ArrangementsLink arrangements
          Link to the arrangements associated with this step.
          Since:
          2.34
        • automaticNextStep
          AutomaticNextStepLink automaticNextStep
          Link to the next step that will be automatically triggered after this step.
          Since:
          2.22
        • availablePrograms
          List<AvailableProgram> availablePrograms
          The list of programs available for this step.
          Since:
          2.18
        • configuration
          StepConfiguration configuration
          The configuration of the step.
        • currentState
          ProcessState currentState
          The current state of the step. Now an enumeration since release 2.31.3 of the client.
          Since:
          2.18
        • dateCompleted
          Date dateCompleted
          The date and time the step was completed.
          Since:
          2.22
        • dateStarted
          Date dateStarted
          The date and time the step was started.
          Since:
          2.22
        • details
          StepDetailsLink details
          Link to the details associated with this step.
          Since:
          2.18
        • limsid
          String limsid
          The LIMS id of the step.
        • placements
          PlacementsLink placements
          Link to the placements associated with this step.
        • pools
          PoolsLink pools
          Link to the pools associated with this step.
        • programStatus
          ProgramStatusLink programStatus
          Link to the program status associated with this step.
        • reagentLots
          ReagentLotsLink reagentLots
          Link to the reagent lots associated with this step.
          Since:
          2.18
        • reagents
          ReagentsLink reagents
          Link to the reagents associated with this step.
        • setup
          StepSetupLink setup
          Link to the setup associated with this step.
          Since:
          2.18
        • technician
          Technician technician
          The technician assigned to this step.
          Since:
          2.34
        • uri
          URI uri
          The URI of the step.

          List<ControlTypeLink> permittedControlTypes
          List of permitted control types for this step.
        • permittedInstrumentTypes
          List<GenericTypeLink> permittedInstrumentTypes
          List of permitted instrument types for this step.
          Since:
          2.25
        • permittedReagentCategories
          List<GenericTypeLink> permittedReagentCategories
          List of permitted reagent categories for this step.
        • processType
          ProcessTypeLink processType
          The process type associated with this step.
        • protocolStepIndex
          Integer protocolStepIndex
          The index of this step within the protocol.
        • protocolUri
          URI protocolUri
          The URI of the protocol this step belongs to.
        • queueFields
          List<QueueField> queueFields
          List of fields to display in the queue view.
        • requiredReagentKits
          List<ReagentKitLink> requiredReagentKits
          List of required reagent kits for this step.
          Since:
          2.18
        • sampleFields
          List<Field> sampleFields
          List of fields to display for samples.
        • stepFields
          List<Field> stepFields
          List of fields to display on the step.
        • stepProperties
          List<StepProperty> stepProperties
          List of step properties.
        • stepSetup
          StepSetup stepSetup
          Configuration for the step setup view.
        • transitions
          List<NextStep> transitions
          List of transitions to next steps in the protocol.
        • uri
          URI uri
          The URI of the protocol step.
